name: Landmark Rewards SBI Card SELECT
exclusions: transactions excluded under Landmark Rewards SBI Card SELECT terms
milestoneBenefits: 12,000 bonus reward points on annual retail spends of Rs 3 lakh
additionalBenefits: 6,000 bonus reward points after joining fee payment
15 reward points per Rs 100 at Landmark stores including Lifestyle, Max, Home Centre, Spar, Babyshop and EasyBuy
10 reward points per Rs 100 on dining, movies and international spends
2 reward points per Rs 100 on other non-fuel eligible retail spends
4 reward points equal Rs 1 when redeemed against eligible Landmark store spends or statement debit where applicable
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends from Rs 500 to Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per month
